title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Care Ratings - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Care Ratings - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Care Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Nashik. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Care Ratings:
Care Ratings is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Ratings!
